name: Claude Code
description: Local coding agent via the Claude Code CLI (claude --print). Full agentic mode with file editing, shell commands, and test running. The CLAUDE unit type in RepoCiv is a direct bypass to this harness.
auth: none (local binary; credentials managed by claude CLI's own auth flow)

session.flag: -c / --continue (resumes most recent conversation in the working directory)
session.stateful_agents: Pass -c for stateful unit types to persist conversation across missions
session.stateless_agents: Omit -c; each mission starts a fresh context

model_selection: --model flag; user selects via UI model picker
note: CLAUDE always routes directly to this harness regardless of the harness selector in the UI.

profile_binding.harness_ref_semantics: 'default' uses the Claude CLI's own active session context (cwd-based). 'managed:<name>' injects identity from ~/.repociv/profiles/<name>/CLAUDE.md via system_prompt. No native --profile flag exists in claude CLI.

identity_mode.native: Edit ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md (user-level memory) — affects all Claude sessions globally
identity_mode.managed: Read/write ~/.repociv/profiles/<name>/CLAUDE.md; inject via system_prompt prepend on dispatch

profile_binding.dispatch_injection: Prepend identity file content to system_prompt passed in the prompt arg
profile_binding.harness_options_note: No native profile list. Managed profiles are dirs under ~/.repociv/profiles/ with harness=claude
